tweet.text:
Bama fans! Nikco Sports is unveiling this exclusive, limited edition Nick Saban Legacy football that features all of Alabama's championships under Saban.
Only 5,000 will ever be made so use my code MILLER for $10 off and order yours today! https://t.co/wEA5SNSy0X #RollTide https://t.co/UInz2u6y1J

RT @gray_robertson: Check out the CTSN booth cam, and then let’s keep the party going with the Everwood Postgame Party on all @UA_CTSN affi…
RT @UA_CTSN: Excited to have @gray_robertson and @christianmillr close out our @AlabamaFTBL gameday coverage with the Everwood Postgame Par…

RT @UA_CTSN: Gray Robertson and Christian Miller are in the building for the Everwood Postgame Party!
